changes: Added typed GovTurnPlan dataclass with all required architecture-law fields.
Added deterministic GovTurnPlan builder, validator, and worker renderer.
Added MiniMax fallback-only validation for advisor and worker selection.
Added worker-baton validation preventing raw advisor/surface-thought carry-through.
Builds one GovTurnPlan after deterministic Gov/advisor admission and before each worker provider call.
Replaces direct CAPTAIN BRIEF prompt insertion with the rendered GovTurnPlan control packet in non-streaming and streaming paths.
Records GovTurnPlan in runtime metadata and context-budget telemetry.
Preserves existing deterministic visible-release, memory-admission, search/tool authorization, and streaming buffering boundaries.

changed_test_files.coverage: GovTurnPlan required fields, hash, MiniMax fallback-only gates, single worker-facing packet, no raw advisor carry-through, search/tool authorization, and runtime metadata.
Updated prompt assertion from direct CAPTAIN BRIEF to admitted GovTurnPlan control packet while preserving constitutional tone law.
